summary: Video. A local KOB4 (Albuquerque) Eyewitness News segment titled 'Teaching the Trades' about a plumbers and pipefitters union expanding a pre-apprenticeship program into Del Norte High School. It is a broadcast news package with anchors, reporter narration, and interviews, reposted by DOL.
notable_text: KOB4 EYEWITNESS NEWS; 'NEW TONIGHT: TEACHING THE TRADES - LOCAL TRADE UNION EXPANDS TO DEL NORTE HIGH SCHOOL'
